UD JURY TRIALS

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-05-2024 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Plaintiff Take Legend LLC is present, represented by Agnes Yeh.
Attorney Walter Lin for the plaintiff.
Defendant Brian Johnson & Lori Przybylo is present.
Attorney Jacqueline Patton appearing for defendant in limited scope.

Settlement discussions held with a Judge Samuel K. Feng. This case settles. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which is filed. The trial date of Dec-09-2024 is vacated.
